tabs.tools.label: Tools
settings.tools.artifactSpillThreshold.de: Tool output above this size is saved as an artifact; tail is kept inline
settings.tools.artifactTailBytes.label: Artifact Tail Size (KB)
settings.tools.artifactTailBytes.descrip: Amount of tail content kept inline when output spills to artifact
settings.tools.artifactHeadBytes.label: Artifact Head Size (KB)
settings.tools.artifactHeadBytes.descrip: Amount of head content kept inline alongside the tail when output spills to artifact (middle elision). 0 disables — keep tail only.
settings.tools.outputMaxColumns.label: Output Column Cap
settings.tools.outputMaxColumns.descript: Per-line byte cap for streaming tool outputs (bash, ssh, python, js eval) and `read`. Lines wider than this are ellipsis-truncated; remaining bytes up to the next newline are dropped. 0 disables.
settings.tools.artifactTailLines.label: Artifact Tail Lines
settings.tools.artifactTailLines.descrip: Maximum lines of tail content kept inline when output spills to artifact
settings.todo.enabled.label: Todos
settings.todo.enabled.description: Enable the todo tool for task tracking
settings.todo.reminders.label: Todo Reminders
settings.todo.reminders.description: Remind the agent to complete todos before stopping
settings.todo.reminders.max.label: Todo Reminder Limit
settings.todo.reminders.max.description: Maximum number of todo reminders before giving up
settings.todo.eager.label: Create Todos Automatically
settings.todo.eager.description: How strongly to push automatic todo-list creation after the first message
settings.todo.eager.options.default.desc: Model decides; no automatic todo list
settings.todo.eager.options.preferred.de: Suggests a todo list on the first message (reminder, not forced)
settings.todo.eager.options.always.label: Always
settings.todo.eager.options.always.descr: Forces a comprehensive todo list on the first message
settings.glob.enabled.label: Glob
settings.glob.enabled.description: Enable the glob tool for glob-based file lookup
settings.grep.enabled.label: Grep
settings.grep.enabled.description: Enable the grep tool for regex content search
settings.grep.contextBefore.label: Grep Context Before
settings.grep.contextBefore.description: Lines of context before each grep match
settings.grep.contextAfter.label: Grep Context After
settings.grep.contextAfter.description: Lines of context after each grep match
settings.astGrep.enabled.label: AST Grep
settings.astGrep.enabled.description: Enable the ast_grep tool for structural AST search
settings.astEdit.enabled.label: AST Edit
settings.astEdit.enabled.description: Enable the ast_edit tool for structural AST rewrites
settings.debug.enabled.label: Debug
settings.debug.enabled.description: Enable the debug tool for DAP-based debugging
settings.speechgen.enabled.label: Speech Generation
settings.speechgen.enabled.description: Enable the tts tool for on-device (Kokoro) or xAI Grok Voice speech-file synthesis
settings.inspect_image.enabled.label: Inspect Image
settings.inspect_image.enabled.descripti: Enable the inspect_image tool, delegating image understanding to a vision-capable model
settings.checkpoint.enabled.label: Checkpoint/Rewind
settings.checkpoint.enabled.description: Enable the checkpoint and rewind tools for context checkpointing
settings.fetch.enabled.label: Read URLs
settings.fetch.enabled.description: Allow the read tool to fetch and process URLs
settings.vault.enabled.label: Obsidian Vault
settings.vault.enabled.description: Enable the vault:// internal URL for reading and editing Obsidian vault content via the Obsidian CLI. When disabled, vault:// resolution is refused and the vault:// entry is omitted from the system prompt.
settings.github.enabled.label: GitHub CLI
settings.github.enabled.description: Enable the github tool (op-based dispatch for repository, issue, pull request, diff, search, checkout, push, and Actions watch workflows)
settings.github.cache.enabled.label: GitHub View Cache
settings.github.cache.enabled.descriptio: Cache rendered issue/PR view output in ~/.omp/cache/github-cache.db so repeated reads are free
settings.github.cache.softTtlSec.label: GitHub Cache Soft TTL
settings.github.cache.softTtlSec.descrip: Within this window, cached issue/PR view rows are returned directly (seconds; default 5 minutes)
settings.github.cache.hardTtlSec.label: GitHub Cache Hard TTL
settings.github.cache.hardTtlSec.descrip: Past the soft TTL the cached row is returned and refreshed in the background; past the hard TTL it is dropped (seconds; default 7 days)
settings.web_search.enabled.label: Web Search
settings.web_search.enabled.description: Enable the web_search tool for live web results
settings.browser.enabled.label: Browser
settings.browser.enabled.description: Enable the browser tool for scripted Chromium automation (puppeteer)
settings.browser.headless.label: Headless Browser
settings.browser.headless.description: Launch browser in headless mode (disable to show browser UI)
settings.browser.cmux.label: cmux Browser
settings.browser.cmux.description: Use cmux WKWebView surfaces for browser automation when a cmux socket is available. Set PI_BROWSER_CMUX=0 or PI_BROWSER_CMUX=1 to override.
settings.browser.screenshotDir.label: Screenshot Directory
settings.browser.screenshotDir.descripti: Directory to save screenshots. If unset, screenshots go to a temp file. Supports ~. Examples: ~/Downloads, ~/Desktop, /sdcard/Download (Android)
settings.tools.intentTracing.label: Intent Tracing
settings.tools.intentTracing.description: Ask the agent to describe the intent of each tool call before executing it
settings.tools.abortOnFabricatedResult.d: With in-band tool calls, stop the model immediately when it starts hallucinating a tool result mid-turn. Disable to let the model finish generating and discard the fabricated continuation instead.
settings.tools.maxTimeout.label: Max Tool Timeout
settings.tools.maxTimeout.description: Maximum timeout in seconds the agent can set for any tool (0 = no limit)
settings.async.enabled.label: Async Execution
settings.async.enabled.description: Enable async bash commands and background task execution
settings.async.pollWaitDuration.label: Max Poll Time
settings.async.pollWaitDuration.descript: How long the poll tool waits for background job updates before returning the current state. A fixed value waits that exact duration every time. `smart` adapts: it starts at 5s and lengthens with each back-to-back poll (up to 5m), then resets to 5s after about a minute without polling.
Default — adaptive 5s→5m, resets when you stop polling
settings.irc.timeoutMs.label: IRC Timeout
settings.irc.timeoutMs.description: Default timeout for irc wait (and send await:true) in milliseconds; 0 disables the timeout
settings.irc.timeoutMs.options.0.label: Disabled
settings.tools.discoveryMode.label: Tool Discovery
settings.tools.discoveryMode.description: Hide tools behind a search tool to save tokens. 'auto' hides MCP tools once the tool set has more than 40 tools; 'mcp-only' always hides MCP tools; 'all' hides all non-essential built-ins too.
settings.tools.essentialOverride.label: Essential Tools Override
settings.tools.essentialOverride.descrip: Override the always-loaded built-in tools (default: read, bash, edit, write, glob, eval). Leave empty to use defaults.
settings.mcp.enableProjectConfig.label: MCP Project Config
settings.mcp.discoveryMode.label: MCP Tool Discovery
settings.mcp.discoveryMode.description: Hide MCP tools by default and expose them through a tool discovery tool
settings.mcp.discoveryDefaultServers.des: Keep MCP tools from these servers visible while discovery mode hides other MCP tools
settings.mcp.notifications.label: MCP Update Injection
settings.mcp.notifications.description: Inject MCP resource updates into the agent conversation
settings.mcp.notificationDebounceMs.desc: Debounce window in milliseconds for MCP resource updates before injecting them into the conversation
settings.tasks.todoClearDelay.label: Todo Auto-Clear Delay
settings.tasks.todoClearDelay.descriptio: Delay before completed or abandoned todos are removed from the todo widget
settings.dev.autoqa.label: Auto QA
settings.dev.autoqa.description: Enable automated tool issue reporting (report_tool_issue) for all agents
settings.dev.autoqaPush.endpoint.label: Auto QA Push Endpoint
settings.dev.autoqaPush.endpoint.descrip: Full URL receiving Auto QA JSON reports (default https://qa.omp.sh/v1/grievances)
